name: ATL Midtown Auto
description_short: ATL Midtown Auto is a used car dealership in Atlanta, GA specializing in Tesla and luxury pre-owned vehicles with on-site dealer financing and online credit applications.
description_long:
ATL Midtown Auto is a used car dealership operating out of midtown Atlanta, Georgia, at 741 Piedmont Ave NE. The business focuses on pre-owned imported and domestic vehicles, with a notable emphasis on Tesla electric vehicles and luxury brands. No founding year has been verified publicly, and the company holds no CDFI, HUD, or NFCC certifications — those designations apply to financial institutions, not vehicle retailers. They serve buyers primarily in the Atlanta metro area.

The core offering is the sale of pre-owned vehicles, spanning brands such as Tesla, BMW, Maserati, Mercedes-Benz, Jeep, and Kia. Customers can browse current inventory online and submit a credit application directly through the dealership's website at atlmidtownauto.com/creditapp. A trade-in program is also available at atlmidtownauto.com/trade. Dealer financing is facilitated through the dealership, meaning buyers work with ATL Midtown Auto to secure an auto loan — they are not a direct lender. Specific interest rates, loan terms, and eligibility criteria were not published at time of research.

Customers consistently highlight the no-pressure sales environment and absence of hidden fees, with the dealership earning a 5.0-star Google rating across 65 reviews and a 5-star rating on Kelley Blue Book. Tesla listings include documented warranty transfers — for example, a 2023 Tesla Model Y with basic warranty through July 2027 and battery warranty through July 2031 — which signals attention to vehicle documentation and buyer assurance. iSeeCars rates the dealership at 3.5 out of 5 based on listing data, and the dealership was showing approximately 11 vehicles on Autotrader at the time of research, indicating a boutique-scale inventory.

ATL Midtown Auto's primary strength is its curated selection of Tesla and premium pre-owned vehicles paired with a transparent sales approach that buyers praise in reviews. The main limitation is scale: inventory appears small (roughly 10–15 vehicles at any time), and this is not a traditional lender — buyers needing competitive financing rates should compare options independently. BBB accreditation status was unverified, and no money-back guarantee or certified pre-owned program was documented. Buyers outside the Atlanta metro area will find this dealership impractical given its physical-location-centric model.
pros: 5.0-star Google rating across 65 reviews — consistently praised for transparency and no-pressure sales
5-star rating on Kelley Blue Book dealer listings
Specializes in Tesla inventory with documented warranty transfers (e.g., battery coverage through 2031)
No hidden fees reported by customers across multiple review platforms
Online credit pre-application available — no need to visit in person to start financing
Trade-in program available directly through the dealership website
Luxury and EV focus provides curated inventory not typically found at volume dealers
cons: Small boutique inventory (~10–15 vehicles), limiting selection compared to larger dealerships
Not a direct lender — financing terms and rate competitiveness depend on third-party arrangements not disclosed publicly
BBB accreditation and rating unverified — no confirmed profile found
iSeeCars rating of 3.5/5 based on listing data is notably lower than Google and KBB scores
Physical Atlanta location only — impractical for out-of-state buyers
best_for: Atlanta-area buyers seeking a pre-owned Tesla with documented warranty coverage
Luxury vehicle shoppers wanting a no-pressure, transparent buying experience
Buyers who want to start the financing process online before visiting the lot
Consumers trading in a vehicle and purchasing a replacement in a single transaction
diagnosis: ATL Midtown Auto is best suited for Atlanta metro buyers specifically seeking pre-owned Tesla or luxury vehicles in a low-pressure environment with transparent pricing. The main caveat is that this is a small-inventory boutique dealer, not a lender — buyers should independently compare auto loan rates rather than relying solely on dealer-arranged financing.
services: Tesla inventory sales with warranty documentation
Luxury brand vehicle sales (BMW, Maserati, Mercedes-Benz, Jeep, Kia)
